value: Sara and Eva's dad. Mid-30s man, clean-shaven bald head, neat full dark beard with a hint of auburn, warm brown eyes behind modern rectangular eyeglasses, broad friendly smile, medium build. Wears a n

Sara and Eva's dad. Mid-30s man, clean-shaven bald head, neat full dark beard with a hint of auburn, warm brown eyes behind modern rectangular eyeglasses, broad friendly smile, medium build. Wears a navy henley shirt with the top two buttons undone, charcoal chinos, warm-brown casual sneakers. Warm, approachable dad energy.

value: Sara and Eva's mom — a fitness coach. Mid-30s woman with straight shoulder-length golden-blonde hair (often in a top-knot or loose ponytail), warm brown eyes, bright smile, light sun-kissed skin, trim athletic toned build (visibly strong, great posture). Wears a coral-pink athletic tank top, high-waist heather-gray training leggings, clean white cross-training sneakers, slim fitness watch on the left wrist.

4-year-old little sister. Big bouncy halo of LIGHT-GOLD-BROWN curly hair (honey / caramel / wheat-blonde with warm golden tone, NOT auburn, NOT reddish) with a pastel-pink bow clipped on the right side. Warm brown eyes, fair peachy skin, rosy cheeks, wide dimpled smile with tiny baby teeth. Small compact build, shorter than Sara (about 2/3 her height). Wears a soft-pink sweatshirt with a small rainbow on the chest, lavender leggings, light-pink sneakers. Playful, expressive.
